cards.title: AI Agent Tools
cards.why_trending: Autonomous AI agents are replacing human workflows. Market hit $5B in 2025 and is doubling yearly. Every business needs automation.
ways_to_earn: Build no-code AI agents with Make.com + GPT and sell to small businesses
Offer agent setup as a service for $500–2K per client

cards.title: Vibe Coding
cards.why_trending: AI-generated apps via prompts went mainstream. 40% of new apps in 2025 built with AI assistance. No coding skills needed anymore.
ways_to_earn: Flip AI-built micro-SaaS tools on Acquire.com or MicroAcquire
Build and sell landing pages for $200–800 each

cards.title: Faceless YouTube Channels
cards.why_trending: AI voiceover + video tools made faceless channels explode. Top channels earn $10K+/mo with zero on-camera presence.
ways_to_earn: Start a faceless niche channel using ElevenLabs + Runway + ChatGPT scripts

cards.title: AI-Powered Newsletters
cards.why_trending: Newsletters with AI curation grew 300% in 2025. Beehiiv topped 1M+ creators. Low overhead, high margin business model.
ways_to_earn: Launch a niche newsletter on Beehiiv, monetize with sponsors + paid tier

cards.title: Print-on-Demand + AI Art
cards.why_trending: Midjourney + Printify combo let solo creators sell merch globally. POD market reaches $48B by 2030. Zero inventory risk.
ways_to_earn: Design AI art collections and sell via Etsy + Printify integration

cards.title: Prompt Engineering Courses
cards.why_trending: Every company needs staff who can use AI tools effectively. Prompt courses on Udemy sell 10K+ copies. Demand still outpaces supply.
ways_to_earn: Create a niche prompt course on Gumroad or Udemy for a specific industry

cards.title: Humanoid Robot Training Data
cards.why_trending: Tesla Optimus & Figure AI need massive datasets. Companies pay $30–80/hr for human motion capture. Market growing 400% YoY.
ways_to_earn: Sell motion capture datasets on Scale AI or Remotasks
Recruit teams for robot training sessions ($500–2K per session)

cards.title: Local AI Setup Services
cards.why_trending: Privacy concerns pushed businesses to run AI locally. Ollama downloads hit 10M+. SMBs pay $500–2K for setup but don't know how.
ways_to_earn: Offer local LLM setup service for law firms, clinics, and finance companies
Create setup guides and sell on Gumroad ($49–99)

cards.title: AI Voice Cloning Services
cards.why_trending: ElevenLabs hit $1B valuation. Podcasters, YouTubers, and brands need multilingual voice clones. Service demand up 600% since 2024.
ways_to_earn: Offer voice cloning + dubbing packages to content creators ($200–500/video)
Build a voice clone library for audiobook publishers

cards.title: Crypto Education Content
cards.why_trending: Bitcoin hit $120K in early 2026. Millions of new investors need education. Crypto YouTube channels average 500K views/month on basics.
ways_to_earn: Launch a 'crypto for beginners' YouTube channel or Substack
Sell a beginner crypto course on Gumroad ($49–149)

cards.title: GLP-1 Supplement Niche
cards.why_trending: Ozempic demand created a $15B adjacent supplement market. People seek natural alternatives. Affiliate commissions up to 40% per sale.
ways_to_earn: Build a review blog + YouTube channel for GLP-1 alternatives (affiliate)
White-label supplement brand targeting weight loss audience

cards.title: Solar + Home Battery Consulting
cards.why_trending: US solar installations up 45% in 2025. Homeowners confused by tax credits and options. Consultants charge $300–1,000 per assessment.
ways_to_earn: Offer paid solar assessment reports ($199–499 per homeowner)
Partner with installers for referral fees ($500–2K per install)
cards.what_you_need: Solar basics knowledge + local installer network

cards.title: AI SaaS Micro-Tools
cards.why_trending: Solo founders are building niche AI tools that solve one problem. Micro-SaaS with 50–200 users generates $3K–15K/mo recurring revenue.
ways_to_earn: Build a single-feature AI tool using Claude or GPT API and charge $9–49/mo
Sell to a niche (lawyers, designers, coaches) for premium pricing
cards.what_you_need: Basic coding or no-code tools (Bubble/Glide) + API access

cards.title: AI Data Labeling Agency
cards.why_trending: Every AI model needs labeled data. Market is $5B+ and growing 25% yearly. Startups outsource labeling — they need reliable partners.
ways_to_earn: Start a labeling micro-agency, source work from Scale AI + Toloka
Offer fixed-price labeling packages to AI startups ($5K–50K/project)
cards.what_you_need: Team of 5–10 labelers + quality control process

cards.title: Digital Twins for SMBs
cards.why_trending: Digital twin technology moved from enterprise to SMBs. Restaurants, retail, and logistics save 20–35% on ops with AI simulations.
ways_to_earn: Offer digital twin consulting for restaurants and retail shops
Build simple digital twins using Python + AI and charge $2K–10K

cards.title: B2B AI Integration Consulting
cards.why_trending: 90% of companies want AI but 70% don't know how to implement it. Consultants charge $150–400/hr. Demand exceeds supply in every sector.
ways_to_earn: Offer AI readiness audits to SMBs ($500–2K per audit)
Build retainer consulting deals ($3K–10K/mo per client)
cards.what_you_need: AI tools knowledge + B2B sales skills

cards.title: Creator Economy Automation
cards.why_trending: Content creators spend 40% of time on non-creative tasks. Tools that automate scheduling, editing, and analytics command $50–200/mo subscriptions.
ways_to_earn: Build an automation workflow for creators using Zapier + AI (sell as a service)
Create a niche automation SaaS for a specific creator type (podcasters, streamers)

cards.title: Web3 Gaming Assets
cards.why_trending: Web3 gaming market rebounds to $65B in 2026. NFT in-game items for top 10 games trade at $500–50K. AI generation cuts creation costs 90%.
ways_to_earn: Create and sell AI-generated in-game NFT assets on OpenSea or Blur
Build character skin packs for popular Web3 games on commission
